title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 16.
content:
There was a Young lady of Portugal,
    Whose ideas were excessively nautical;
    She climbed up a tree,
    To examine the sea,
    But declared she would never leave Portugal.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 16."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
